action.reasoning: Observation: 0% success rate with 100k steps. Stand=54.6/800, Walk=4.5/700. Analysis: Need much more training. 100k steps is ~12.5k per env with 8 envs - far too few. Decision: Train all 10 tasks with 500k steps each, 16 envs, larger network. Focus on getting some tasks above success_bar. Estimated ~4-5 hours for all 10 tasks.
action.command: python train.py --timesteps 500000 --n_envs 16 --tasks h1hand-stand-v0 h1hand-walk-v0 h1hand-sit_simple-v0 h1hand-balance_simple-v0 h1hand-pole-v0 h1hand-door-v0 h1hand-run-v0 h1hand-reach-v0 h1hand-push-v0 h1hand-package-v0
